title: Smasiagon Toddler Toys for 1 2 3 Year Old Boys, Magnetic Drawing Board Doodle Pad for Toddlers 1-3, Educational Learning Travel Toys for Baby Boys Girls Birthday Chritsmas Gifts (Blue)
features: 🎁 Not A Child Seat, But A Doodle Board: Unique screw tightening design and high-quality legs allow the drawing board to have a strong load-bearing capacity, up to 120lbs. No need to worry about shaking or breaking. The 4 legs of drawing table can be detachable and changed the format for 3 ways. Let children draw more freely and comfortably.

🎁 Larger Drawing Zones: Magnetic drawing board for toddlers 1-3 displays 4 colors (Red, Yellow, Blue, Green) that make child’s drawing more vivid. With 9.8" screen doodle pad can be used repeatedly. One year old boy can easily pull the slide back and forth, then it will be clean again. Extend the life of the toy and let your child love it all the time.

🎁 Safe & Environmentally Friendly: Made of non-toxic, BPA-free, high-quality and eco-friendly ABS plastic material. It's a mess-free, reusable way to feed toddler boy age 1-2’s desire to create and scribble. Instead of costly reams of paper, paints, crayons, pencils, and other art supplies you need to restock, one board lasts as long as for 1 2 year old boy’s attention span. And your walls will be saved from those crayon or marker lines that can be hard to remove.

🎁 Easy To Use: The design of the handle belt is convenient to carry everywhere.These magna doodle board can also be taken on car, train, boat, and plane journeys, and 1 2 3 year old girls won’t create a mess on grandma’s carpet the way paints might. The pen and the rope is integrated, no need to worry about the sudden loss of the pen, allowing children to draw more smoothly.

🎁 Educational Toys For Toddlers: Draw, write and play games on this erasable sketch pad using the stylus to encourage your child’s creativity and help them to learn how to express themselves visually. Not just for art. Use magnetic drawing boards for math, number recognition, learning shapes, even does their homework.
description: Product Description Not Only A Magnetic Drawing Board But A Effective Early Education Tool Whether playing tic-tac-toe, practicing math, learning about shapes, or creating pictures, a magnetic drawing board is a versatile tool for your child. A mess-free, reusable way to feed your child’s desire to create and scribble. Instead of costly reams of paper, paints, crayons, pencils, and other art supplies you need to restock, one board lasts as long as your child’s attention span. And your walls will be saved from those crayon or marker lines that can be hard to remove. These sketch pads can also be taken on car, train, boat, and plane journeys, and they won’t create a mess on grandma’s carpet the way paints might. It not just for art. Use magnetic drawing boards for math, number recognition, learning shapes, or for anything you might write down or draw. Use them to draw together, learn together, and laugh together. They offer a type of screen time you can feel good about. And when you’re child draws something extraordinary, remember to snap a quick picture of it before it’s erased. It is the perfect kids' toys choice as top Christmas gifts toys for kids 2022, toddler boys Christmas gifts; Halloween gifts; birthday gifts. Specifications: Material: durable ABS plastic, BPA-free Board Size: 30.5*27cm (12*10.6in) Drawing Area: 20*15cm (8*5.8in) Color Zone: 4 colors in 4 zones (Red, Yellow, Blue, Green) Suitable Age: 18+ months Education: alphabet, mathematic, shape, painting, writing, etc. BSEN71-1 of the UKCA safety certification requires that children under 18 months must use a cord less than or equal to 22cm, otherwise it can easily wrap around the neck and become dangerous.
